latestObserved: Danon personal homepage presents his independent expert work in international and Swiss tax law, with emphasis on expert opinions, arbitration, cross-border tax disputes, and tax reforms.
latestObservedZh: Danon 個人主頁呈現其國際與瑞士稅法專家工作，重點包括專家意見、仲裁、跨境稅務爭端與稅制改革。

label.zh: Robert J. Danon LinkedIn 個人頁

latestObserved: Search-visible LinkedIn profile identifies Danon as a tenured full professor and Tax Policy Center head; LinkedIn pages may require sign-in and must remain secondary evidence.
latestObservedZh: 公開搜尋可見摘要顯示 Danon 為洛桑大學教授並主持 Tax Policy Center；LinkedIn 可能受登入限制，只作輔助線索。

latestObserved: Public search-visible company page describes the center as research and education in international tax law, Swiss tax law, transfer pricing, and EU tax law.
latestObservedZh: 公開搜尋可見摘要將中心定位為國際稅法、瑞士稅法、轉讓定價與歐盟稅法的研究與教育平台。

label.zh: 洛桑大學 Tax Policy Center
label.en: University of Lausanne Tax Policy Center

latestObserved: Official center page lists Research, Tax & Investment Law, Executive Education, MLaw International Tax, Events, and Past News sections.
latestObservedZh: 官方中心頁列出研究、Tax & Investment Law、進修課程、國際稅法碩士、活動與過往消息等入口。

latestObserved: UNIL research page lists Danon-related works including Abuse Prevention in Tax Treaty Law, IFA on Tax Treaty Interpretation, and 2024 GloBE dispute prevention materials.
latestObservedZh: UNIL 研究頁列出 Danon 相關著作，主題包括租稅協定濫用防止、協定解釋與 GloBE 爭端預防。

label.zh: Vikram Chand / Pillar Two 與轉讓定價
label.en: Vikram Chand / Pillar Two and transfer pricing

latestObserved: UNIL research page lists in-preparation and in-press Chand works on permanent establishments under the Pillars, mobility, financial transactions, and Pillar II tax incentives.
latestObservedZh: UNIL 研究頁列出 Chand 進行中或即將出版的研究，涵蓋 Pillars 下常設機構、跨境流動、金融交易與 Pillar II 稅收優惠。

signals: 2026 OECD Manual on Effective Mutual Agreement Procedures
future revision of OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines
latestObserved: UNIL/ICC program for 27-28 May 2026 identifies MAP, BAPA, tax treaty disputes, global mobility, transfer pricing disputes, OECD TP Guidelines revision, Side-by-Side Package, and Pillar Two dispute prevention as frontier signals.
latestObservedZh: UNIL/ICC 2026 年 5 月活動把 MAP、BAPA、租稅協定爭端、全球流動、轉讓定價爭端、OECD TP Guidelines 修訂、Side-by-Side Package 與 Pillar Two 爭端預防列為前沿議題。

label.zh: OECD Pillar Two 行政指引與執行工具
label.en: OECD Pillar Two administrative guidance and implementation toolkit

latestObserved: OECD 2026 materials include consolidated commentary, implementation toolkit, and side-by-side package.
latestObservedZh: OECD 2026 年材料包含 GloBE 合併註釋、全球最低稅負執行工具包與 Side-by-Side Package。

label.zh: UN 國際稅務合作框架公約談判
label.en: UN Framework Convention on International Tax Cooperation negotiations

latestObserved: Page now fetchable with browser headers (2026-07-06). Latest documents: CRP.26 FC template, CRP.27 services options paper, CRP.28 dispute-resolution concept note (all late Jan 2026); INC-5 on 3-13 Aug 2026, zero draft of the dispute protocol due there.
latestObservedZh: 頁面已可抓取（2026-07-06 換瀏覽器 headers）。最新文件：CRP.26 公約模板、CRP.27 服務課稅選項、CRP.28 爭端解決概念說明（均 2026 年 1 月下旬）；INC-5 於 2026-08-03–13 舉行，爭端議定書零草案屆時提交。

label.zh: South Centre 國際稅務合作專頁

latestObserved: Added 2026-07-06 as a Global South counterweight to the Danon/OECD-adjacent sources on this desk; intergovernmental think tank of developing countries, active written inputs to the INC process.
latestObservedZh: 2026-07-06 新增：作為本桌 Danon／OECD 系來源的南方對照視角；發展中國家政府間智庫，持續向 INC 程序提交書面意見。

label.zh: ICTD UN 稅務公約主題頁

latestObserved: Added 2026-07-06; research institute (not advocacy) focused on taxation and development, publishes session-by-session analysis of the INC negotiations.
latestObservedZh: 2026-07-06 新增：專研稅收與發展的研究機構（非倡議組織），逐場分析 INC 談判。

label.zh: Tax Justice Network UN 公約專頁
label.en: Tax Justice Network UN tax convention

latestObserved: Added 2026-07-06; advocacy organization with a declared position (anti-mandatory-arbitration) — treat as stance-bearing signal per the desk's source-stance rule, already cited (attributed) in the 2026-07-06 digest.
latestObservedZh: 2026-07-06 新增：有明確立場（反強制仲裁）的倡議組織——依本桌立場來源規則視為帶立場訊號，digest 已具名引用。
